Yeah, but they synergize extremely well when paired up altogether and don't need eachother to perform well. Mainly there to significantly boost their stats or health regen to survive for longer periods of time to stall / secure kills or be used as a premium afk team for farming content

Actual afk team
Best GMurphy team I can make? Planning to get e3 maybe
GMurphy/Caecus/Tulu/Thais
Within Arc 2 might consider placing Faros over Caecus, but I'm not sure how good that would be without her E3.
Goliath is also a good option, but needs E2

Basically:
GMurphy/Thais/Tulu/Flex
Flex: Arc 1: Caecus || Arc 2: Goliath (E2), Faros (E3)

GMurphy/Goliath/Celeste/Flex
Flex: Caecus (needs at least E1), Nautila.
Team is kinda meh, but you don't have other options
Getting E1 Caecus and placing Thais instead of Celeste would be a huge improvement
One sec, will make the teams for you

GMurphy/Miryam/Tulu/Goliath (Perfect team)
------------------------------
Castor/Pollux/Winkle/Flex (Perfect team)
Flex: Horla, Erica. 
Mention: Erica is fine at E0, Horla wants E1 for vuln/weakness apply.
------------------------------
Doresain/Pickman/Thais/Flex (I'm not sure about this one)
Flex: Horla, Erica. 
Mention: Place whoever you won't use in Castor team.
------------------------------
Tawil/Ryker/Karen/Ramona (Perfect team)

P.S. I have 0 knowledge about Doresain and his impact pre E3. If he is too painful to use, tell me, I'll reform the teams.

I would probably use Erica in Castor team since Horla isn't E1.
Honestly I'm having doubts about Doresain team since it took a premium support like Thais.
Doresain doesn't really need thais, he just need a embryo support
But he does struggle against A4 and A5
Yeah, I initially placed her in GMurphy team
But If I do so, there's no one left to place with him
If you find some options, tell about them.

As for the wheels, sorry, but that's too much work right now.
General advice - spread your wheels across the teams equally, so that each team will have at least Keyflare support with Keyflare wheel, same for DPS. 
If there are insufficient situations for other 2 awakeners, just give them Burial Grounds with DR wheels, unless their passive scales off something else.
Maybe someone else will help with wheels optimising, or that will be me after my rest. Place them like you think it would be good and ask for optimisation here later.
Mkay I can get Thais after E2 Gmurphy
Don't forget to grab GMurphy's wheel if you still haven't done so.
